hospitalName: Max Super Speciality Hospital, Shalimar Bagh
hospitalAddress: FC 50, Max Wali Rd, C and D Block, Shalimar Place Site, Shalimar Bagh, New Delhi, Delhi, 110088, India

hospitalName: Max Super Speciality Hospital, Shalimar Bagh
name: Boniface Muswilwa Chitambala
text: I am Mrs Inonge K. Chitambala from Zambia  came to India max hospital saket for treatment. After my surgery I felt good like never before. I never knew that my health would change from bad to good. I would recommend anyone to this hospital @dr Surbhi, Dr anant & Ashu , Mumtaz just like someone recommended me. The members of staff are wonderful.

hospitalName: Max Super Speciality Hospital, Shalimar Bagh
name: Gurbanmyrat Akmyradow
text: Excellent hospital with world-class doctors and high-level medical service. Special thanks to the International Patient Lounge (IPC) team. Our coordinator Nikhil Malik is an amazing professional, always online and helpful at every step. Huge thanks to Satendra for guiding us through the hospital and helping with all the medical tests, our translator Inam for his great support, and Sudhir Pathak for the safe and smooth airport pickup. Highly recommend Max Hospital Saket for international patients!

hospitalName: Max Super Speciality Hospital, Shalimar Bagh
name: Khutheibamrocket Ali
text: Very helpful in the duties of doctors and nurses while treating patients in the hospital.The hospital is equipped with most modern sientific technological machines like Robotic machine for treatment of Robotic surgeries. The hospital is very neat and clean which is very hygienic to the patients. Moreover the duties assigned by Ms Prema and Mr Prabhakar both coordinators working in Max Hospital Saket are very excellent in so far as help of the patients coming from far places either within India and foreign countries.is concerned. In short I appreciate the hospital and staff including doctors.
